body_transformation: The tail tip now glows with a soft violet mist that shifts to lilac at the edges, while the white underbelly retains its shape but gains a delicate silver shimmer across its surface. The dark orange accents on the head and tail base transform into smooth, translucent violet ridges that follow the natural contours of the skin. The stubby legs take on a slender, elongated form with a faint silver glow along their joints, and the original light orange body color is replaced by a soft lavender hue that subtly reflects the ethereal energy. Delicate neural pathways become visible as faint, glowing lines beneath the skin, tracing the natural curves of the body without altering its structure.
signature_feature: Tail tip: ethereal violet mist with lilac shimmer and soft silver glow.
